docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MCDOW, CRAIG AS TO DEFENDANT YIN, LINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2024 BY JUDGE: BRADEN WOODS. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PLAINTIFF CRAIG MCDOW AND DEFENDANT LINA YIN. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCDOW, CRAIG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YIN, LINA $11,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,075.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
